name: Newsten

sheet.name: Newsten
sheet.background_story:
I miss the Olsten, straight from the 'Go Sten
Chop up the soul Sten, set on his goals Sten
I hate the Newsten , the bad mood Sten
The always rude Sten, spaz in the news Sten
I miss the sweet Sten, chop up the beats Sten
I gotta to say at that time I'd like to meet Olsten
See I invented Sten, it wasn't any Olstens
And now I look and look around and there's so many Olstens
